svg.desc: Component: Assistant Page (ServiceControlPanel + Tabs: Chats + Guardrails) Page: /assistant Design system version: 3.6 (2026-03-23) Artboards: desktop 1440px — Frame 1 (Chats tab) y=0, Frame 2 (Guardrails tab) y=950

g.text: Can you help me schedule a meeting for tomorrow?
What's the weather forecast for this week?
I need help writing a short bio for my LinkedIn profile.
Translate this paragraph to French for me please
What are the best Python libraries for data analysis?
Stopping: outline "Stopping..." button with Loader2 spinner, disabled
Error: AlertTriangle (text-red-600) + error text + Retry button

svg.text: Frame 2 — Assistant / Guardrails tab (GuardrailsPanel — PRIMARY FOCUS)

g.text: Empty blacklist state: "No blacklisted chats." — text-sm text-zinc-500
Confirm dialog (Trash click): Dialog max-w-md, title "Remove from blacklist",
Loading state: 3 skeleton rows h-8 w-full. Error: text-red-600 + Retry button.
